# Plain list of email addresses, one per line — generated by
# scripts/export_contacts.sh from your Google Contacts.
#
# Copy this file to contacts_emails.txt (gitignored — never committed) or,
# better, just run export_contacts.sh to generate it from your own account.
# prune.sh and label_reference.sh use this list to avoid trashing/skipping
# mail from people you actually know.
#
# Examples (dummy data — replace with your own export):
alice.example@gmail.com
bob.smith@example.com
carol_jones@example.org
